name: Dr. Anika Rahman
bio: PhD from BUET, 12 years of teaching experience in algorithms and data structures. Passionate about problem-solving.

name: Prof. Tariq Hassan
bio: Specializes in complex data structures and algorithmic efficiency optimization. Has authored multiple textbooks.

name: Dr. Fahmida Chowdhury
bio: Expert in machine learning and neural networks. Heads the new AI Lab facility at OmniVault.

name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins
bio: Expert in software architecture and agile methodologies. Previously worked at top-tier silicon valley firms.

name: Prof. Michael Chen
bio: Heads the Distributed Systems Research Group. Specializing in kernel optimization and memory management.

name: Dr. Robert Wilson
bio: Researcher in big data analytics and NoSQL optimization techniques. Leads the 'DataFirst' initiative.

name: Dr. Lisa Thompson
bio: Focuses on network topology, high-availability clusters, and the future of 5G/6G communication.

name: Mr. David Miller
bio: Certified security professional with extensive experience in vulnerability assessment and network defense.

name: Ms. Emily Davis
bio: Full-stack enthusiast focused on highly-scalable web applications and modern React ecosystems.

name: Mr. Kevin Park
bio: Mobile developer with several apps boasting over 100k downloads. Expert in cross-platform UI/UX.

name: Dr. Susan White
bio: Specializes in cloud-native architectures and serverless functions for large-scale enterprise deployments.

name: Prof. Steven Hall
bio: Deeply theoretical researcher focusing on complexity theory and Turing machine efficiency limits.
